race.name: GFNY Chile
race.tagline: 79.5-mile wine valley sufferfest with 6,007ft and a 27% Muro de Tunquén gut punch.

vitals.field_size: Hundreds of international riders from Latin America and beyond, targeting 1,000+ participants.
vitals.registration: Opens via official site with mandatory NYC-designed, Italy-made GFNY jersey and individual chip timing for age-group qualifiers.
vitals.feed_zones: Full GFNY logistical support with pro-level feeding on the challenging course.
vitals.cutoff_time: Not specified; designed for broad finishers with top 10% age-group qualifiers.
route_options: Long: 79.5mi, 6007ft — Competitive full-distance with rankings and qualifiers.

climate.description: Early September in Casablanca brings mild early spring temps ideal for hard efforts. Expect sunny skies over vineyards with low humidity. Light coastal breezes add edge without extremes.

terrain.primary: Brutal paved rollers with wine valley stunners
terrain.surface: Silky smooth pavement slices through Casablanca's vineyards and coast. Roads twist relentlessly with punchy ramps. Signature walls demand pure power.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 76. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 73.

course_description.character: Coastal rollers explode into wine valley brutality over 79.5 miles. Paved perfection winds past vineyards with relentless ups. Signature muro defines the sufferfest amid stunning scenery.
course_description.signature_challenge: Muro de Tunquén: The 27% beast that breaks souls and builds legends. Every GFNY Chile tale orbits this wall. Conquer it, own the day.

logistics.airport: Fly into Santiago (SCL), 1.5-hour drive to Casablanca. Rent car or shuttle; plan transfers early.
logistics.lodging_strategy: Base at Viña Veramonte or Casablanca wineries for course recon. Book vineyards early for race-week immersion.
logistics.food: World-class Chilean wines and seafood post-race. Local empanadas fuel up; finisher feasts await.

history.origin_story: Launched in 2018 as GFNY's Chilean outpost, it tapped Casablanca's wine valley for mass-participation pain. Grew fast into Latin America's beacon, blending pro vibes with amateur access. Now 7th edition cements iconic status amid global series.
history.reputation: Renowned for unique challenges drawing Latin pros and tourists. GFNY polish meets Chilean soul. Qualifier staple with festival flair.

biased_opinion.summary: GFNY Chile weaponizes Casablanca's beauty into a 79.5-mile punch to the gut, crowned by the soul-crushing 27% Muro de Tunquén. Riders chase GFNY glory amid vineyards and coast, feeling pro for a day. Brutal yet accessible, it's Latin America's must-ride gem. Production sparkles; the pain lingers sweetly.
biased_opinion.bottom_line: Pin it if you crave iconic climbs and global cred. Skip unless Latin America calls. Qualifier gold for smart sufferers.

final_verdict.one_liner: Brutal beauty where vineyards meet vertical pain.
final_verdict.should_you_race: Yes if you're qualifier-hunting or muro-obsessed with travel grit. Skip if mega-fields or cheap thrills are your jam.
final_verdict.alternatives: GFNY California for stateside punch, GFNY Cozumel for tropical pain, GFNY NYC Worlds qualifier.

citations.label: GFNY Super Sunday with two races in South America

videos.title: GFNY CHILE 2019  CASABLANCA
videos.description:
¡¿QUÉ ESPERAS PARA SER PARTE DEL EVENTO DE CICLISMO AMATEUR MÁS GRANDE DEL MUNDO?!

VIVE LA EXPERIENCIA DE BE A PRO FOR A DAY.

ADEMÁS RECORRE LOS HERMOSOS PAISAJES DEL VALLE CENTRAL DE CHILE JUNTO A CIENTOS DE AMANTES DEL CICLISMO NACIONAL E INTERNACIONAL.
GFNY CHILE LLEGA CON UNA RUTA INOLVIDABLE PARA LOS PARTICIPANTES Y SUS ACOMPAÑANTES.

ELIGE EL CIRCUITO DE 140K O DE 80K Y TENDRÁS UNA DE ESAS PEDALEADAS INOLVIDABLES Y DE NIVEL INTERNACIONAL EN CICLISMO DE RUTA EN CHILE.
